violations.text: Food observed stored on the floor in the market aisle. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 07/17/2025

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the sandwich and prep areas. New Violation. Correct By: 07/17/2025
Plastic trays with metal rods in the seafood area were were not in good repair, with pieces broken off. New Violation. Correct By: 07/17/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris walk in cooler ceiling fan nets food prep sink in produce area ceiling light covers area beneath grill drawer in pizza area can opener base Chest freezers had an accumulation of frost Adhesive residue observed in several areas . New Violation. Correct By: 07/17/2025

The wall near the dough machine in the pizza prep area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/17/2025

The ceiling in the dairy walk in cooler has an accumulation of soil residue and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/24/2025

The ceiling in the bakery walk in cooler has an accumulation of frozen water droplets. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/24/2025

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by rodent droppings beneath bread shelves and rice shelves. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 12/06/2024

The floors beneath market shelves have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris and/or rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/06/2024
